Hero.title: Modern POS &
Hero.subtitle: One unified platform to manage stock, process sales, track suppliers, and grow your business — with native M-Pesa integration and real-time insights.

CoreFeatures.subtitle: A complete, integrated platform built around the real operational needs of Kenyan retail and SME environments.
CoreFeatures.inventoryDesc: Automatic stock deduction on every sale. Set low-stock thresholds with instant SMS/email alerts. Manual adjustments, transfers, and expiry tracking built in.
CoreFeatures.posDesc: Lightning-fast barcode + name search, multi-discount support, cash & M-Pesa payment, change calculation, partial payments, and cancel last transaction.
CoreFeatures.mpesaDesc: Seamless Safaricom M-Pesa integration via official API. Accept Lipa na M-Pesa payments at checkout with real-time confirmation — no manual reconciliation.
CoreFeatures.receiptsDesc: Instant thermal printer output (ZPL/ESC-POS), PDF email receipts, and WhatsApp delivery. All tenant-branded, all automatically generated.
CoreFeatures.rbacDesc: Five-tier role-based access control: Super Admin, Tenant Admin, Manager, Cashier. Tenant-scoped JWTs, bcrypt password hashing, and session management.
CoreFeatures.analyticsDesc: Daily, weekly, and monthly sales charts. Top 10 products and customers. Profit margin by category. Stock movement, valuation (FIFO/LIFO), and custom exports.
CoreFeatures.multiTenantDesc: Complete data isolation per tenant via PostgreSQL RLS or separate schemas. Zero cross-tenant data leakage. Each business is its own secure silo.
CoreFeatures.purchaseOrdersDesc: Create, approve, and receive purchase orders. Stock automatically updated on goods receipt. Full supplier management with payment terms tracking.
CoreFeatures.realTimeSyncDesc: Socket.io powers live cart updates, stock alerts, and cross-device synchronisation — all tenant-isolated. Sub-500ms response time guaranteed.

PointOfSale.subtitle: From barcode scan to receipt in under 2 seconds. Support for cash, M-Pesa, card, and bank transfer — with real-time change calculation and partial payments.
PointOfSale.feature1: Barcode (EAN-13) + name search with instant results
PointOfSale.feature2: Multiple discount types — percentage and fixed amount
PointOfSale.feature3: M-Pesa, Cash, Card, and Bank Transfer payment modes
PointOfSale.feature4: Thermal printer, email PDF, and WhatsApp receipts
PointOfSale.feature5: Cancel last transaction and full refund flow
PointOfSale.feature6: Loyalty card points earned and redeemed at checkout

Payment.subtitle: Accept M-Pesa payments directly at the POS with STK Push. No manual till entries, no float management headaches — just seamless, verified transactions.
Payment.step1Desc: Tap "Pay via M-Pesa" at checkout — the customer's phone number is confirmed automatically.
Payment.step2Desc: Customer receives a payment prompt on their phone. They enter their M-Pesa PIN to confirm.
Payment.step3Desc: Payment is verified in seconds. The sale completes, receipt prints, and stock updates — automatically.
Payment.successDesc: Transaction KSH 887.00 was successful. Receipt is being printed.

Analytics.subtitle: Stop managing by instinct. DUKAPOS turns your sales and inventory data into clear, actionable insights — available in real time, exportable on demand.
Analytics.feature1Desc: Bar and line charts for daily, weekly, and monthly performance. Compare periods side by side to spot trends early.
Analytics.feature2Desc: Automatic ranking of your top 10 best-selling products and highest-value customers — always up to date.
Analytics.feature3Desc: Accurate stock valuation using FIFO or LIFO costing methods. Export full reports to CSV, PDF, or Excel.
Analytics.feature4Desc: Filter by category, payment method, date range, or cashier. Build the exact view your business needs.

AccessControl.title: The Right Access for Every Role
AccessControl.subtitle: Role-based permissions ensure data security while keeping every team member productive.
AccessControl.adminDesc: Complete system access and configuration management.
AccessControl.securityNote: All roles are scoped by tenant, ensuring data never leaks between businesses. JWT-based authentication protects every request.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: All plans include full platform access, M-Pesa integration, thermal printer support, and cloud hosting.

FAQ.title: Common Questions
FAQ.contactTeam: Can't find your answer? Contact our team
FAQ.q1: Does it work offline without internet?
FAQ.a1: Yes. The POS and inventory functions work fully offline. Data syncs automatically when your connection is restored. M-Pesa and cloud reporting require internet.
FAQ.q2: Can I import my existing product list?
FAQ.a2: Absolutely. You can import your entire product catalog in seconds using our CSV template. We also support manual entry for individual items.
FAQ.a3: DUKAPOS is browser-based and works on any PC, tablet, or smartphone. For a full setup, we recommend a standard barcode scanner and an 80mm thermal receipt printer.
FAQ.a4: Security is our priority. We use industry-standard JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and complete data isolation per tenant to ensure your data is never shared or exposed.
FAQ.q5: How does the M-Pesa integration work?
FAQ.a5: We use native Safaricom M-Pesa STK Push. When you initiate a payment, the customer receives an instant prompt on their phone to enter their PIN. Confirmation is real-time.
FAQ.q6: Can I try it before purchasing?
FAQ.a6: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card is required to start exploring how DUKAPOS can transform your business.

Trust.title: What our customers say
Trust.subtitle: Real stories from real businesses transformed by DUKAPOS.
Trust.aminaMwangiQuote: DUKAPOS completely eliminated our end-of-day stock discrepancies. M-Pesa integration works flawlessly — our cashiers love it. We've reduced stock losses by over 30% in three months.
Trust.jamesKariukiQuote: The analytics dashboard alone is worth the subscription. I can now see exactly which products are moving, what margins I'm making, and where I'm losing money — all in real time.
Trust.fatumaOdhiamboQuote: We run four branches across Mombasa and the multi-tenant system keeps everything perfectly separated. The Enterprise plan's dedicated support team responds within the hour. Exceptional product.

HowItWorks.title: Get Started in Minutes
HowItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to transform your retail business with modern technology.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and configure your business profile — name, location, currency, and tax settings in under 5 minutes.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Import your product catalogue via CSV or add manually. Set barcodes, categories, prices, and reorder levels.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Invite cashiers and managers. Assign roles with the appropriate access levels and permissions.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Open the POS, scan products, accept M-Pesa or cash, and print receipts. Your stock updates automatically.
HowItWorks.readyToStart: Ready to Start? Sign Up Now
